parameters.query: UPDATE searches SET status = 'processing', workflow_execution_id = '{{ $execution.id }}' WHERE id = '{{ $json.search_id }}' RETURNING id, status;

SELECT j.id, j.title, j.company_name, j.company_logo_url, j.city, j.work_modality, j.contract_type, j.required_education, j.required_experience_years, j.required_skills, j.preferred_skills, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.description, j.category, j.tags FROM jobs j WHERE j.status = 'active' AND ({{ $('🔧 Normalizar Datos').item.json.criteria.city != '' }} = false OR j.city ILIKE '%{{ $('🔧 Normalizar Datos').item.json.criteria.city }}%' OR j.work_modality = 'remoto') LIMIT 50;
UPDATE searches SET jobs_found = {{ $json.jobs_found }}, status = 'scoring' WHERE id = '{{ $json.search_id }}';

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ profile: $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.profile, vacancies: $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.vacancies, top_n: 20 }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO matches (search_id, user_id, job_id, total_score, skills_score, experience_score, location_score, salary_score, education_score, modality_score, semantic_score, score_explanation, matched_skills, missing_skills, rank_position) VALUES ('{{ $json.search_id }}', '{{ $json.user_id }}', '{{ $json.job_id }}', {{ $json.total_score }}, {{ $json.skills_score }}, {{ $json.experience_score }}, {{ $json.location_score }}, {{ $json.salary_score }}, {{ $json.education_score }}, {{ $json.modality_score }}, {{ $json.semantic_score }}, '{{ $json.score_explanation }}', ARRAY[{{ $json.matched_skills.map(s => `'${s}'`).join(',') }}], ARRAY[{{ $json.missing_skills.map(s => `'${s}'`).join(',') }}], {{ $json.rank_position }}) ON CONFLICT (search_id, job_id) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE searches SET status = 'completed', jobs_scored = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM matches WHERE search_id = '{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id }}'), completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id }}';

INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, message, data) VALUES ('{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.user_id }}', 'matches_ready', '¡Tus matches están listos!', 'Encontramos {{ $('🧠 Microservicio Scoring').item.json.results.length }} vacantes compatibles con tu perfil. Revísalas ahora.', '{"search_id": "{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id }}", "count": {{ $('🧠 Microservicio Scoring').item.json.results.length }}}') RETURNING id;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ search_id: $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id, status: 'completed', matches_count: $('🧠 Microservicio Scoring').item.json.results?.length || 0 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, search_id: $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id, message: 'Workflow completado exitosamente', execution_id: $execution.id }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO audit_logs (user_id, entity_type, entity_id, action, message, service, metadata) VALUES ('{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.user_id }}', 'search', '{{ $('📦 Agregar Vacantes').item.json.search_id }}', 'WORKFLOW_COMPLETED', 'Workflow n8n ejecutado correctamente', 'n8n', '{"execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}", "matches": {{ $('🧠 Microservicio Scoring').item.json.results?.length || 0 }}}');
